sentiment.reasoning: An unexpected decline in revenue from a specific region indicates weaker demand or operational issues, negatively impacting financial performance.

headlines.headline: Urvel Grid recalls products in renewable storage line due to quality concerns

headlines.headline: Zrovex Industries warns of supply chain disruptions affecting North America operations

sentiment.reasoning: A warning of supply chain disruptions directly impacts operational efficiency, potentially leading to production delays, increased costs, and reduced sales.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
